message:
{"title": "API Key Required", "message": "To use the AI model, you need to set up your API key.

**How to fix this:**
1. Get your API key from your AI provider
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Add your API key for your AI provider
4. Save and try again

**Don't have an API key?**
• Sign up at your AI provider's website
• Create an API key in your account settings
• Copy it and paste it here

**Your conversations and work are safe** - this is just a setup step!", "severity": "warning", "category": "authentication", "icon": "🔑", "suggestion": "Add your API key in Settings", "actions": [{"label": "Open Settings", "type": "open_settings", "url": "/settings", "highlight": true, "data": {}}, {"label": "Get API Key", "type": "get_api_key", "url": "https://docs.forge.ai/setup/api-keys", "highlight": false, "data": {}}, {"label": "Learn More", "type": "help", "url": "https://docs.forge.ai/getting-started", "highlight": false, "data": {}}], "technical_details": "Error authenticating with the LLM provider. Please check your API key", "error_code": "LLM_AUTHENTICATION_ERROR", "can_retry": false, "retry_delay": null, "help_url": "https://docs.forge.ai/setup/api-keys", "reassurance": "This is normal! Just add your API key to get started.", "metadata": {"session_id": "8f6530038c5f4628995aaad0aa28ea44"}, "timestamp": "2026-03-09T15:24:56.206857+00:00"}

{"title": "API Key Required", "message": "To use the AI model, you need to set up your API key.

**How to fix this:**
1. Get your API key from your AI provider
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Add your API key for your AI provider
4. Save and try again

**Don't have an API key?**
• Sign up at your AI provider's website
• Create an API key in your account settings
• Copy it and paste it here
